purpose: Detailed file-level guide for the WEEX AI Wars contract-only trader skill. Open this only after manifest.json has routed you to the right area.

linux_vault.role: Application-vault management family with Linux terminal flows and Windows/macOS UI entrypoints.

scripts/weex_contract_api.py.role: Primary real contract/futures REST CLI with automatic AI Wars log upload for AI-driven live contract executions.
when: automatic AI log upload after business-successful AI-driven live contract actions

scripts/weex_ai_api.py.role: AI Wars UploadAiLog REST CLI and shared validation/capture helper used by automatic contract AI log upload.
when: capturing the exact outgoing AI log request body

scripts/capture_ai_log_upload_evidence.p.role: Local evidence bundle generator for UploadAiLog request-shape and encoding debugging.
when: capturing sanitized UploadAiLog request headers and serialized body
debugging UTF-8 or shell encoding issues in AI explanations
creating a backend-debugging evidence bundle before or after a live UploadAiLog attempt

scripts/weex_profile_store.py.role: Shared profile metadata and application-vault backend.

scripts/weex_agent_state.py.role: Lightweight AI-facing cache for stable host routing facts and fresh vault/profile checks.
when: refreshing runtime cache before or during CLI entrypoints
reading non-secret host, vault, and profile summary state

scripts/weex_profile_language.py.role: Language-resolution helper for localized profile, GUI, and vault wrappers.

scripts/weex_url_policy.py.role: Shared allowlist and shape validation for WEEX REST base URLs.
when: validating custom contract or AI Wars REST hosts
checking WEEX_API_BASE and AI log API base overrides
rejecting non-WEEX hosts before credentials are loaded or signed

scripts/weex_gui_bootstrap.py.role: Managed GUI runtime bootstrap for macOS and Windows entrypoints.
when: Tk crashes before the GUI opens
validated reuse of a managed Python virtual environment

scripts/weex_gui_launcher.py.role: Detached launcher for GUI profile/vault entrypoints when the current macOS or Windows shell cannot keep child GUI processes alive; macOS uses a transient .app wrapper, Windows prefers a hidden background launch, and launcher records/logs are bounded under ~/.weex-trader-skill/gui-launchers.
when: launching a WEEX GUI from an AI/tool-managed shell
explicitly detaching the profile manager UI
explicitly detaching the vault manager UI
verifying GUI launch metadata and logs

scripts/weex_doctor.py.role: User-facing runtime doctor command for guided diagnostics and repair.
when: verifying whether GUI fallback is already healthy

scripts/weex_runtime_setup.py.role: Cross-platform one-command runtime setup helper for the current Python interpreter.
when: installing requirements.lock into the active interpreter with hash verification
repairing a missing pip via ensurepip before installation

scripts/weex_trade_data_aggregator.py.role: Normalized real contract trade data aggregation layer for replay, profile, order-risk, and account-risk analysis inputs.
when: collecting futures history into a normalized replay payload
building profile, order-risk, and account-risk payloads for the analysis skill

scripts/weex_order_intent_state.py.role: Pending-order confirmation state store for preview-before-submit trading flows, including execution metadata in the risk signature.
when: saving the latest pending order intent
loading the latest pending order intent
checking whether an order confirmation intent has expired

scripts/weex_risk_review_core.py.role: Vendored copy of the shared order/account risk review core used by both installable WEEX skills.
when: verifying the trader skill stays aligned with the analysis skill

scripts/weex_trade_risk_review.py.role: Thin trader-local wrapper that re-exports the vendored shared risk review core for standalone trade guard flows.
when: following trade guard imports for preview-order or account-scan flows
locating the trader-side wrapper around the shared risk review core

scripts/weex_trade_guard.py.role: Preview and confirmation guard for real contract order actions.
when: previewing a live contract order before submission
requiring explicit confirmation before a real contract order is sent
collecting account-risk payloads for contract-only risk review
list, show, save, delete, set-default, clear-default

scripts/weex_profiles.py.role: Compatibility wrapper that auto-selects the localized profile CLI entrypoint.
when: terminal profile management when language should be read from agent-init.json

scripts/weex_profiles_en.py.role: English entrypoint for the localized profile CLI.
when: terminal profile management for English-language sessions

scripts/weex_profiles_zh.py.role: Chinese entrypoint for the localized profile CLI.
when: terminal profile management for Chinese-language sessions

scripts/weex_profile_manager_app.py.role: Localized Tkinter GUI profile manager implementation.
when: interactive profile setup on macOS or Windows

scripts/weex_profile_manager.py.role: Compatibility wrapper that auto-selects the localized profile manager UI.
when: GUI profile management when language should be read from agent-init.json

scripts/weex_profile_manager_en.py.role: English entrypoint for the localized profile manager UI.
when: interactive profile setup in English on Windows or macOS

scripts/weex_profile_manager_zh.py.role: Chinese entrypoint for the localized profile manager UI.
when: interactive profile setup in Chinese on Windows or macOS
guided terminal flow instead of raw flags

scripts/weex_linux_profile_wizard_common.role: Shared shell helper library used by the localized Linux onboarding scripts.
when: debugging Linux wizard prompts and validation

scripts/weex_linux_profile_wizard_en.sh.role: English entrypoint for the Linux onboarding wizard.

scripts/weex_linux_profile_wizard_zh.sh.role: Chinese entrypoint for the Linux onboarding wizard.

scripts/weex_vault_cli.py.role: Localized application-vault manager with Windows/macOS UI handoff and Linux terminal flows.

scripts/weex_vault.py.role: Compatibility wrapper that auto-selects the localized vault entrypoint.
when: vault management when language should be read from agent-init.json

scripts/weex_vault_en.py.role: English entrypoint for the localized vault manager.
when: vault setup or unlock in English

scripts/weex_vault_zh.py.role: Chinese entrypoint for the localized vault manager.
when: vault setup or unlock in Chinese

scripts/weex_vault_manager_app.py.role: Tkinter vault-control UI launched by the vault CLI on Windows/macOS.
when: interactive vault setup on Windows or macOS
debugging the global vault control area

scripts/weex_vault_agent.py.role: Background manual_once vault session agent that keeps the decrypted vault key in a short-lived local session channel.

scripts/generate_weex_api_definitions.py.role: Regenerates local JSON and Markdown endpoint catalogs from live WEEX docs.
when: new endpoints need to be imported

requirements.txt.role: Human-edited Python dependency input constraints required by profile, vault, and private trading flows.

requirements.lock.role: Hashed Python dependency lockfile used for runtime and managed GUI installation.
when: a Python dependency such as cryptography is missing
setting up a fresh interpreter on Windows, macOS, or Linux

references/auth-and-signing.md.role: Compact auth and signing reference for private REST calls.

references/profile-manager.md.role: Windows/macOS account manager guide for the GUI workflow, field meanings, and common profile operations.
when: how to use the visual profile manager

references/script-operations.md.role: Direct script invocation, runtime prerequisite, and maintenance command reference.
when: installing Python dependencies for repo scripts
checking shell command context or launcher policy
running quick market checks or representative order commands

references/profile-onboarding.md.role: OS-specific saved-profile setup matrix and profile-management command guide.
when: which setup path fits this operating system

references/linux-vault.md.role: Linux encrypted-vault mode selection, risk trade-offs, and lock/unlock reference.
when: vault status, unlock, lock, or password changes

references/troubleshooting.md.role: Common operator-visible failures and recovery path reference.
when: default profile problems or other recovery steps

SKILL.md.role: Primary operating guide and policy document for this skill.

reference_guide.README.md: High-level overview, install notes, and natural-language usage examples.
reference_guide.references/script-operations.md: Direct script invocation, runtime prerequisite, and maintenance command reference.
reference_guide.references/profile-manager.md: Windows/macOS account manager guide for the GUI workflow and common profile operations.
reference_guide.references/profile-onboarding.md: OS-specific saved-profile setup matrix and profile-management command guide.
reference_guide.references/linux-vault.md: Linux vault mode selection, risk trade-offs, and operational reference.
reference_guide.references/troubleshooting.md: Common operator-visible failures and recovery path reference.
